news.title: IU Indianapolis graduates highlight community impact through business and policy work
news.summary_en: Indiana University Indianapolis will graduate over 5,600 students this week. Graduates Aissa Condori and Evren Elliott share how IU Indianapolis shaped their growth and career paths.
